title: PrintProfile
description: Voucher print layout parameters. All kiosks MUST use identical print profiles to ensure the same physical output regardless of which unit prints a voucher. Template versioning prevents layout drift across a fleet.

paper.description: Physical paper/stock type and width. 'receipt_80mm' is the standard for most ATM/kiosk thermal printers.

dpi.description: Printer resolution in dots-per-inch. Must match the physical printer capability; mismatches cause QR distortion.

template_id.description: Stable identifier for the voucher layout template. Kiosks load the template matching this ID from their local template store.

template_version.description: Version of the named template. Kiosks MUST refuse to print if they do not have this exact version loaded, and must log a CONFIG_MISMATCH audit event.
